**Root cause:** The `fetchAllowedChannel` function in `/mnt/data/discord-server/src/access.ts` checks `(ch as any).recipientId` on DM channels to verify the recipient is in the allowlist. In discord.js v14, `DMChannel.recipientId` is only set when the API response includes `data.recipients` (in the `_patch` method).
